spots.name: Ha Long Bay
spots.shortDescription: A UNESCO World Heritage seascape of limestone islands rising from emerald water.
spots.whyVisit: Cruises, kayaking, caves and wide coastal views.
spots.nearbyAttractions: Ti Top Island, Sung Sot Cave
spots.travelTips: Book a cruise ahead, bring sunscreen and check weather conditions.
spots.mapQuery: Ha Long Bay, Quang Ninh, Vietnam

spots.name: Gardens by the Bay
spots.shortDescription: A futuristic waterfront garden known for its Supertree Grove and cooled conservatories.
spots.whyVisit: Cloud forests, floral displays, skyline views and evening light shows.
spots.openingHours: Outdoor gardens daily; conservatory hours vary
spots.topActivities: Supertree light show, Cloud Forest, Flower Dome
spots.travelTips: Book conservatory tickets online and stay for the evening light show.

spots.name: The Grand Palace
spots.shortDescription: Bangkok’s dazzling former royal complex, home to the sacred Emerald Buddha.
spots.whyVisit: Thai architecture, gilded temples and royal history.
spots.topActivities: Temple photography, Wat Phra Kaew, royal architecture
spots.travelTips: Dress modestly, arrive early and ignore unofficial ticket touts.

spots.name: Mount Fuji
spots.shortDescription: Japan’s iconic volcanic peak, admired for its near-perfect cone and seasonal landscapes.
spots.whyVisit: Classic views, hiking, lakeside scenery and Japanese cultural symbolism.
spots.bestTime: October–February for clear views; July–September for climbing
spots.entranceFee: Viewing areas vary; climbing rules and fees vary
spots.travelTips: Check visibility forecasts and trail status before travelling.

spots.name: Petronas Twin Towers
spots.shortDescription: The twin towers define Kuala Lumpur’s skyline with an elegant steel-and-glass design.
spots.whyVisit: Skybridge views, observation deck and the surrounding KLCC district.
spots.travelTips: Reserve timed entry online, especially on weekends.
spots.mapQuery: Petronas Twin Towers, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia

spots.name: Angkor Wat
spots.shortDescription: The world’s largest religious monument and the centrepiece of Angkor’s temple complex.
spots.whyVisit: Sunrise, intricate bas-reliefs and monumental Khmer architecture.
spots.travelTips: Buy your Angkor pass in advance and carry water in the heat.

spots.name: Borobudur Temple
spots.shortDescription: A vast ninth-century Buddhist monument of stone terraces and bell-shaped stupas.
spots.whyVisit: Sunrise atmosphere, Buddhist art and views over volcanic Central Java.
spots.openingHours: Morning to afternoon; sunrise access varies
spots.travelTips: Wear comfortable shoes and book sunrise access early if offered.

spots.name: Chocolate Hills
spots.shortDescription: More than a thousand rounded limestone hills that turn cocoa-brown in the dry season.
spots.whyVisit: A uniquely Philippine landscape with broad viewing-deck panoramas.
spots.travelTips: Visit early for cooler temperatures and clearer views.

spots.name: Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque
spots.shortDescription: A striking white-marble mosque with golden domes and a ceremonial lagoon setting.
spots.whyVisit: Brunei’s signature architecture, serene gardens and sunset photographs.
spots.openingHours: Visitor access varies around prayer times
spots.travelTips: Dress respectfully and check visiting hours around prayers.
spots.mapQuery: Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque, Brunei

spots.name: Bagan Archaeological Zone
spots.shortDescription: An immense plain scattered with thousands of Buddhist temples and pagodas.
spots.whyVisit: Sunrise temple views, ancient architecture and e-bike exploration.
spots.openingHours: Daylight hours; access conditions can vary
spots.topActivities: E-bike tour, sunrise viewing, temple exploration
spots.travelTips: Check current local travel guidance before making plans.

spots.name: Kuang Si Falls
spots.shortDescription: Tiered turquoise pools and cascades set in lush forest outside Luang Prabang.
spots.whyVisit: Swimming pools, forest walks and an easy nature escape from the old town.
spots.nearbyAttractions: Luang Prabang Old Town, Tat Kuang Si Bear Rescue Centre
spots.travelTips: Bring swimwear, a towel and shoes with grip.
spots.mapQuery: Kuang Si Falls, Luang Prabang, Laos
